{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Cloud Hammer madra
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Cloud Hammer madra]] looks like mist but gives the spiritual impression of a great fortress wall.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Chon Ma]] uses dark gray [[Cloud Hammer madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
